A data-driven celebration of the incredible ecology of the Sonoran Desert.

We work to bring hidden stories of the desert to life — through photography, data, and deep observation.

Sonoran Species Compendium

A meticulous cataloging effort of species and their interactions at three focal sites in the Sonoran Desert.

Test

A meticulous cataloging effort of species and their interactions at three focal sites in the Sonoran Desert.

Photography

Photography as a means to capture biodiversity in space and time.

Rewilding the Yard

An intimate experiment in transforming an urban yard into a haven for native plants and animals.

Biological Interactions

Documenting ecological relationships between organisms using data-driven tools.

WhiskerWiki

A field ID tool for shrews, moles, and small rodents of the United States.

Artwork

Sketches of desert wildlife — by Laura Steger.
